title: Normalization of Sample Concentrations in Deepwell Plates
author: Opentrons

steps.title: With this flexible protocol, you can...
steps.instruction: With this flexible protocol, you can normalize the concentrations of up to 32 samples. Just upload your properly formatted .json files (keep scrolling for an example), customize your parameters, and download your ready-to-run protocol. ---

steps.title: Diluent volume is calculated and added...
steps.instruction: Diluent volume is calculated and added to all wells in deepwell plate if a 2-step dilution is necessary (maximum working volume of 1600µl). The protocol dynamically calculates the maximum efficiency for P300 multi-channel and P1000 single-channel use.

steps.title: The protocol pauses and prompts the...
steps.instruction: The protocol pauses and prompts the user to add the first column of samples (in a user-specified volume) to dilution plate 1.

steps.title: The P300 multi-channel pipette mixes the...
steps.instruction: The P300 multi-channel pipette mixes the column both at the bottom of each well and halfway up the liquid for homogeneity. The liquid level is automatically calculated to ensure the pipette tip stays submerged.

steps.title: If necessary, the diluted sample is...
steps.instruction: If necessary, the diluted sample is transferred to the corresponding column in dilution plate 3 that contains pre-added diluent (step 1) for a final dilution.
